title: Incident
writer: Harry Lewis, Fred Niblo Jr., Samuel Roeca
actors: Warren Douglas, Jane Frazee, Robert Osterloh
plot: Stockbroker Joe Downey(Warren Douglas), mistaken in the dark for gangster "Slats" Slattery (Robert Osterloh), is brutally beaten by a rival gangster, "Knuckles" Morgan (Meyer Grace), and Downey winds up in jail on a drunk charge. ...
